name: Ultimate Snake
short_description: Snake game is a simple and addictive puzzle game where players control a continuously growing snake, eating food to increase its length while avoiding collisions with itself or the walls.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the Snake game, featuring classic modes, a plethora of levels, diverse gaming modes, personalized level customization, and vibrant color themes.

　　　　　　　　

~ Classic Mode ~
After meticulous research on mobile snake games, the classic mode brings you the most authentic snake experience. Details such as movement, collision, and button feedback have been carefully tuned to replicate the essence of the original snake game. Furthermore, the classic mode offers a global leaderboard, allowing you to compete with friends and family.


　　　　　　　　

~ Player VS Computer ~
In the Player vs. Computer mode, a new challenge awaits you! You can freely adjust the difficulty of the AI, choosing an opponent that matches your skill level, from easy to difficult. Face off against a smart snake controlled by the computer and showcase your abilities to become the true champion of the snake game!
~ Entertainment Mode ~
Tired of traditional snake gameplay? Want to try some novel elements? Look no further than entertainment mode! Here, you can let your snake feast on fruits, pass through walls, or even perform other stunts, enjoying the endless possibilities of snake gaming.

　　　　　　　　



　　　　　　　　

~ Level Mode ~
Whether you prefer a gradual challenge or want to guide your snake through a maze, the level mode caters to your needs. Dozens of well-designed levels await your challenge, so come and show off your skills!


　　　　　　　　

~ Custom Levels ~
If the existing levels don't satisfy you, why not try creating your own custom levels? With just a text editor, you can easily create unique levels tailored to your preferences. You decide the length of the snake, speed, map boundaries, fruit quantity, and obstacle placement—unleash your creativity and build levels exclusive to you!


　　　　　　　　

~ Replay ~
The game's replay feature offers players a unique opportunity to revisit and review their gameplay. By accurately recording every action and decision in the game, you can relive the entire gaming experience from a spectator's perspective after the game ends. Additionally, the replay feature serves as a platform for sharing and learning, allowing you to share your impressive moments with friends or family while also gaining inspiration and experience from watching other players' replays, moving forward together.


　　　　　　　　

~ Color Themes ~
The game comes with a variety of color themes for you to choose from. If these aren't enough, you can further customize additional color themes by modifying configuration files. The interface will display all the themes you've created, making it easy for you to switch between them.


　　　　　　　　

~ Multi-language Support ~
To meet the needs of players from different regions, the game supports multiple languages. Not only can you use the languages provided with the game, but you can also create your own language configuration files, making the game more closely related to your cultural background.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal
